title: Pluner's Weapons
description: Adds new weapons from roblox game decaying winter
body:
Adds Three unique Weapons Based The Roblox Game "Decaying Winter"

These weapons include

The Decimator
Malice
Farier Axe

It also adds music from the game including

"reds song"

this changes gameplay by adding unique ways to slay other players and mobs in pvp and pve
